title: malus odorata
intro: Malus odorata, also known as the Fragrant Apple or Fragrant Crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus odorata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestive health, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and bark are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
